discrepancy_analysis:
A. QUESTION: From Supp Fig 16b, fold change in GLI2 in S462TY cells treated with sonidegib?
B. REPORTED: ~0.38-0.40 (reduction, n=3)
C. MODEL: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
D. DENOMINATOR: N/A
E. ASSUMPTIONS: Supp Fig 16b not in MOESM10
F. STEP-BY-STEP: UNABLE_TO_EVALUATE. Root cause 7:MISSING_DATA_HANDLING.
G. ROOT CAUSE: The underlying source data for Supplementary Figure 16b (GLI2 fold change in S462TY cells treated with sonidegib) was not present in the supplementary file MOESM10 that the model had access to. The model therefore could not reproduce the reported value of ~0.38-0.40. This is classified as a missing data handling issue (category 7) because the data required to answer the question was not available in the dataset provided to the model.
proposed_fix: Obtain the source data for Supplementary Figure 16b (likely in a different supplementary file or provided upon request from the authors) to enable reproduction of the GLI2 fold change values in sonidegib-treated S462TY cells.
